title: Report on Publicly Shared Boards
excerpt: Does anyone know if there’s a way to pull a report that shows which boards have publicly shared links? We’ve identified some boards containing PII, and we need to ensure any public links are broken to maintain data secur…

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know if there’s a way to pull a report that shows which boards have publicly shared links? We’ve identified some boards containing PII, and we need to ensure any public links are broken to maintain data security.

Would appreciate any insights—thanks in advance!
